productDisplayName: Rockport Men Navy Blue Flip Flops
description: Appease the sportsman spirit in you even on casual days with these sporty Altrez flip flops from rockport. Hailing from the rockport XCS range, this toe post flip flop comes with Dynamic Suspension technology to make every movement of your foot as comfortable as it can ever be. Inspired by Sports and offering fantastic comfort, the Altrez is all that you need to alter the comfort of a casual day.Upper Leather upper straps with synthetic twill tape on the outside and fabric lining on the inside for durability, comfort and style Tow separator for absolute comfort and to lock the foot on place Midsole Soft, heavily padded latex footbed to conform to the shape of the foot Dynamic Suspension technology in the footbed that creates a thin air cushion under the foot, moving according to the pressure of the foot, ensuring maximum comfort even with the slightest movement EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and ample shock absorption Outsole Durable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for maximum grip and traction on a variety of surfaces shoe care Brush footbed with a nubuck brush to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
